title: Endless Deep Space
description: Endless Deep Space is an adventure mod that focuses on adding many bosses, small bosses, mechanisms, dimensions, and more.
body:
# Endless Deep Space
Endless Deep Space is an adventure mod that focuses on adding many **bosses, mini bosses, mechanisms, dimensions**, and more.
## Most of the items in the Mod need to be made **using Transform Station**
Transform Station Recipe：![Transform Station Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12384f2be473a3037b1575188f5d70c650b477ab.png)
### 21 types of Guiding Stones have also been added to the Mod, which can emit beacon like beams that can be seen from far and wide. The block where the guiding stone is located will be continuously loaded, and the loading is not limited to dimensions. It can also be automatically loaded after the server or world restarts
White Guiding Stone Recipe：![White Guiding Stone Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72d65797d1c0af2ea1342f4a3c1eff21fb8c96be.png)

All Guiding Stone Picture：![Guiding Stone Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bb19568dd15df4e29056b5d4bfc2fc2a89a5afe.jpeg)
